test_cases.title: Valid user logs in and reaches the inventory page
test_cases.description: Happy path: standard_user signs in with valid credentials and is taken to the inventory page (the URL/landing changes from the login page).
test_cases.automation_decision_reason: The AC is the user journey through the UI — submit the login form and land on the inventory page. It crosses a page boundary (login -> inventory) and there is no separate server API exposed by this demo target to assert against, so the journey can only be validated end-to-end in the browser.
preconditions: BASE_URL points at the Saucedemo login page.
The standard_user account exists (it is a built-in Saucedemo account).
expected_results: The URL changes to the inventory page (/inventory.html).
The login form is no longer shown.

test_cases.title: Inventory page shows the product list after login
test_cases.description: After a successful login the landing page actually renders the product list (guards against a 'logged in but empty page' regression).
test_cases.automation_decision_reason: The AC 'product list is visible' is a rendered-UI assertion on the post-login page. It is only meaningful in the browser after the real login redirect, so it belongs in the same E2E flow rather than at any other level.
preconditions: A successful login has placed the user on the inventory page (TC-001).

steps.action: After logging in as standard_user, observe the inventory page.

expected_results: At least one inventory item (product) is visible on the page.
The product list container is present and non-empty.

test_cases.title: No error message is shown on a successful login
test_cases.description: On a valid login, no error banner / error text appears (a spurious error on success would erode trust even though access was granted).
test_cases.automation_decision_reason: The AC 'no error message is shown' is a negative UI assertion about the success path. It is checked in the same E2E flow as TC-001 (assert the error container is absent after a valid login). No server contract is involved.
preconditions: BASE_URL points at the Saucedemo login page.

steps.action: Log in as standard_user with valid credentials (as in TC-001).
Inspect the page for any error message element.

expected_results: No error banner or error text is present on the page after the successful login.
